summary: Global Currency Conversion feature tested end-to-end. Backend rates endpoint, profile persistence, and currency picker UI all WORK. Found and FIXED a critical regression introduced by this feature: GET /api/profile returned 500 for all pre-existing users because the new non-optional `currency: str = "USD"` field on StyleProfile rejected None values pulled from legacy Mongo docs (doc.get("currency") returns None → pydantic ValidationError). Patched get_profile/update_profile to skip None values so model defaults apply. After fix: 6/6 backend tests pass, 6/7 frontend checks pass; one minor UX issue — wishlist-currency-pill does not refresh immediately after currency change (only after page reload), even though formatPrice already returns new symbol.

critical.issue: FIXED by testing agent. StyleProfile.currency: str = "USD" is non-optional. Legacy profile docs in Mongo have no `currency` key, so `{k: doc.get(k) for k in StyleProfile.model_fields.keys()}` passes `currency=None` to pydantic → ValidationError → 500. Changed dict comprehension to skip None values so default kicks in. Reproduced in backend.err.log at server.py:1544 before fix.

ui_bugs.issue: After changing currency to INR via Profile→Account→modal, navigating back to bottom-tab-wishlist immediately shows the pill text still as 'Prices in USD' even though formatPrice has already switched (body contains ₹ instead of $). The pill text correctly reads 'Prices in INR' ONLY after a hard page reload. Suggests the pill reads currency code from a stale source instead of the useCurrency() hook that powers formatPrice. Recommend wiring the pill text to the same hook state.

action_items: Review the get_profile / update_profile patch at server.py:1541-1556 (skip-None comprehension) and keep it; it also protects future optional/defaulted fields from the same regression class.
Fix wishlist-currency-pill to react to live currency changes (likely re-read from useCurrency() hook instead of a one-shot profile snapshot, or add useFocusEffect refresh on the Wishlist screen).
Optionally seed a wishlist item in the test user account so future runs can verify target_price → INR formatting end-to-end (current test user has empty wishlist).
critical_code_review_comments: Any new non-Optional field added to StyleProfile must also be backfilled at startup (similar to legacy username backfill) OR loaded with None-skipping comprehension. The bug fix above covers any future occurrence.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_currency.py (new pytest suite for /api/currency/rates and profile currency)

success_rate.frontend: ~85% — 6/7 checks pass; wishlist pill refresh lag is the only miss

seed_data_creation: None. Test user (test@closetai.com) was switched to INR during tests then reset to USD via PATCH /api/profile.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_currency.py covers the rates endpoint + profile currency persistence with cleanup. Re-run with `pytest backend/tests/test_currency.py -v`. For the wishlist-pill refresh issue, after main agent fixes, verify: (1) login, (2) navigate bottom-tab-profile → Account, (3) tap currency-setting-row, search 'indian', pick INR, (4) navigate bottom-tab-wishlist, (5) wishlist-currency-pill SHOULD now immediately read 'Prices in INR' WITHOUT a reload.
rca_of_issue: Profile 500 RCA: `StyleProfile.currency: str = "USD"` defaults only apply when key is missing from kwargs. Code passed `currency=None` via dict comprehension `doc.get(k)`. Pydantic v2 rejects None for `str`. Fix = filter None before constructing the model so the default activates. Reproduction: login as test@closetai.com (no currency yet) → GET /api/profile → 500. Backend log: ValidationError at server.py:1544. Mitigation applied + verified with full pytest suite & live login flow now returning currency=USD.
